body.title: Migrate Igor's adopt_next_ticket habit from cmd_claim to cmd_next
body.result: cmd_claim feedback loop stopped (removed _igor_post); sloped retry in worker_daemon (20s after done, 300s when empty); Python code in adopt_next_ticket was already using cmd_next correctly
body.description:
cmd_claim now raises LegacyDirectClaimError (D-queue-encapsulation-2026-05-21). Channel shows repeated errors: 'LegacyDirectClaimError: cmd_claim raises when called without cmd_next context. Old Igor habits describe the direct-claim model: claim a ticket, work it.' The adopt_next_ticket habit (and any related habits referencing cmd_claim) must be migrated to use cmd_next. This is final cleanup for the queue encapsulation decision — Igor should request work, not claim it.

**Affected files:** clan.memories (PROCEDURAL habits referencing cmd_claim), wild_igor/igor/tools/worker_daemon.py or equivalent ticket pickup code
**Design rules:** theigors/rules/coding
**Scope boundary:** In scope: find all habits with cmd_claim references; update to cmd_next; verify no LegacyDirectClaimError after migration. Out of scope: changing cmd_next behavior.
**Test plan:** After migration, run Igor for one full NE cycle with a sprint ticket available; verify no LegacyDirectClaimError in channel. Verify ticket picked up correctly via cmd_next.
